title: epilobium montanum proles lanceolatum
intro: Epilobium montanum proles lanceolatum, also known as the alpine willowherb or lance-leaved willowherb, is a plant species within the epilobium genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat urinary and kidney issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Epilobium montanum proles lanceolatum include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
